title: Electronic device and method for processing secure information
abstract: An electronic device and a method for operating the electronic device are provided. The method includes obtaining first information in a first zone of the electronic device, extracting second information included in the first information in the first zone of the electronic device, and storing the second information in a second zone of the electronic device that has a higher level of security than a level of security of the first zone.
claims: Claims ( 17 ) An electronic device, comprising: a memory; a user interface; and a processor communicatively connected with the memory and the user interface, wherein the memory comprises a first zone and a second zone, the second zone having a higher level of security than a level of security of the first zone, and wherein the memory stores instructions that when executed by the processor, cause the processor to receive first information from outside of the electronic device, store the received first information in the first zone, extract second information from the first information, and store the second information in the second zone. The electronic device of claim 1, wherein the first information comprises token information. The electronic device of claims 1 or 2, wherein the first information comprises token information corresponding to a direct data scheme. The electronic device of any of claims 1 to 3, wherein the second information comprises seed information for generating third information which is output by the user interface. The electronic device of claim 4, wherein the third information comprises a one time password (OTP). The electronic device of claims 4 or 5, wherein the instructions cause the processor to store a secure application list in the first zone to provide support in processing the third information with a server or an application. The electronic device of any of claims 4 to 6, wherein the instructions cause the processor to verify a validity of at least one of the first zone or the second zone. The electronic device of claim 7, wherein the instructions causes the processor not to process the third information, if the at least one of the first zone or the second zone is invalid. The electronic device of any preceding claim, wherein the instructions cause the processor to decrypt the second information and stores the decrypted second information in the second zone. The electronic device of any preceding claim, wherein the instructions cause the processor to store encrypted second information in the second zone and decrypts and use the encrypted second information, when receiving a request for using the second information. The electronic device of any preceding claim, wherein the memory comprises a first memory and a second memory separate from the first memory, wherein the first zone is in the first memory, and wherein the second zone is in the second memory. The electronic device of any preceding claim, wherein the instructions cause the processor to store, in the first zone, information, in which fourth information extracted based on the first information is mapped with the second information. A method for operating an electronic device, the method comprising: receiving first information; storing the first information in a first zone of a memory; extracting second information from the first information; and storing the second information in a second zone of the memory that has a higher level security than a level of security of the first zone. The method of claim 13, wherein the first information comprises token information corresponding to a direct data scheme, wherein the second information comprises seed information for generating third information associated with operating a secure function, and wherein the third information comprises a one time password (OTP). The method of claim 14, further comprising: storing a secure application list in the first zone to provide support in processing the third information with a server or an application. The method of claim 15, further comprising: generating the third information when an application included in the secure application list is executed; and refraining from generating the third information when an application that is not included in the secure application list is executed. The method of claim 14, further comprising: receiving a request to store third information in the first zone; generating at least one of time-based third information and event-based third information based on the second information; and transmitting at least one of the time-based third information and the event-based third information to the first zone.
